title: Template Coverage Analysis and Unexercised Recommendation Paths

anomaly_run_passed_goal_not_completed.reason: No bridge combined_status key matches this taxonomy template name. Template is structurally valid but never reached via bridge(). Recommendation: align bridge combined_status keys with taxonomy keys in a future cleanup EPIC.

completed.reason: Only reachable via passed+completed which is explicitly excluded from advisory scope.

findings.finding: All 4 reachable in-scope templates exercised: 0 violations
4 taxonomy templates orphaned (no bridge combined_status match)
findings.detail: These templates exist in recovery_taxonomy.py but are never reached by the bridge because no bridge combined_status key matches their name. Requires taxonomy-bridge alignment in a future EPIC.

findings.finding: 4 bridge outputs have no taxonomy template → fallback (await_clarification)
findings.detail: Bridge produces combined_statuses without a matching taxonomy key. Fallback template (await_clarification, low confidence) is used. Advisory is still advisory-only and valid. No violations.

recommendations.recommendation: Proceed with selected advisory rollout (4 templates exercised, 0 violations)
Create future EPIC to align bridge combined_status keys with taxonomy template names
recommendations.detail: Fix 4 orphaned templates + 4 bridge outputs without template. Not blocking current rollout — fallback is safe.
